channel.title: Pacific Science Center Special Events
channel.description: Upcoming events for Pacific Science Center Special Events

item.title: Call for STEM Art for Science After Dark
item.description:
Sunday, March 1, 2026 at 12 AM

Location: Pacific Science Center, 200 2nd Ave N, Seattle, WA

PacSci invites local artists to submit work for a STEM Artwalk featured during our May 6 Science After Dark, our 21+ after-hours events.

Event details

item.title: Corporate Member Weekend
item.description:
Thursday, March 12, 2026 at 12 AM

Location: Pacific Science Center, 200 2nd Ave N, Seattle, WA

Make the most of your Corporate Membership at Pacific Science Center during Corporate Member Weekend.

Event details

item.title: Emerald City Irish Film Festival
item.description:
Saturday, March 14, 2026 at 12 AM

Location: Pacific Science Center, 200 2nd Ave N, Seattle, WA

PacSci is thrilled to announce its hosting of the Irish Heritage Club’s Emerald City Irish Film Festival in PACCAR IMAX Theater.

Event details

item.title: Sensory-Friendly Hours
item.description:
Sunday, March 15, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: Pacific Science Center, 200 2nd Ave N, Seattle, WA

Formerly known as Exploration for All, Sensory-Friendly Hours provide a calmer environment for learners with sensory sensitivities.

Event details

item.title: Homeschool Days
item.description:
Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Pacific Science Center, 200 2nd Ave N, Seattle, WA

Once a month, homeschool families are invited to enjoy a day of discovery at Pacific Science Center with special discounted pricing.

Event details

item.title: One Night Only Laser Show
item.description:
Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Pacific Science Center, 200 2nd Ave N, Seattle, WA

Our laserists are bringing alternative bedroom pop artist Remi Wolf at 7:30 p.m., then stick around for UK garage DJ Fred Again at 9 p.m.

Event details

item.title: BrainFest with Allen Institute
item.description:
Saturday, March 21, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Pacific Science Center, 200 2nd Ave N, Seattle, WA

Explore hands-on activities, meet scientists and collaborators, learn about cutting-edge neuroscience research, and even touch a real brain!

Event details

item.title: Live at the Laser Dome: KEXP DJ in Residence
item.description:
Wednesday, April 1, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Pacific Science Center, 200 2nd Ave N, Seattle, WA

PacSci and KEXP’s Live at the Laser Dome: KEXP DJ in Residence is excited to welcome Eastern Echoes’ Diana Ratsamee this spring!

Event details

item.title: Laser Anime
item.description:
Thursday, April 2, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Pacific Science Center, 200 2nd Ave N, Seattle, WA

To celebrate SakuraCon, our laserists are performing hits from your favorite Studio Ghibli movies and Anime shows for one night only!

Event details

item.title: Laser 420
item.description:
Monday, April 20, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Pacific Science Center, 200 2nd Ave N, Seattle, WA

Celebrate 420 in style with a takeover in the Laser Dome, including Wu-Tang Clan, Childish Gambino, Mac Miller, and more.

Event details

item.title: PacSci Ignite Luncheon
item.description:
Friday, May 15, 2026 at 12 AM

Location: Pacific Science Center, 200 2nd Ave N, Seattle, WA

Join us to raise funds that will provide our critical thinkers of tomorrow with hands-on science experiences today.

Event details
